title: Pony.ai Teams With Uber on Robotaxis as Revenues Surge 160%
message_html: Pony.ai Teams With Uber on Robotaxis as Revenues Surge 160% ...
snippet: Uber is teaming with autonomous mobility companies Pony.ai and Verne to launch Europe’s first commercial robotaxi service.
